\tzpentry{ID5779}{Semi Pi Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5779 introduces Semi Pi Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ T_{\text{semi}} = \frac{\pi}{\omega_{\text{beat}}} \approx 12.42~\mathrm{hours}, \]
